core_principles: Trust & Authority: Deep Navy + Pure White

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-11 px-8 rounded-md font-medium transition-all duration-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50 h-11 px-8 rounded-md font-medium transition-all duration-200

cards.service_card: bg-white border border-slate-100 rounded-xl p-6 shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg hover:border-slate-200 transition-all duration-300 group cursor-pointer relative overflow-hidden
cards.feature_card: bg-slate-50/50 border border-slate-100 rounded-lg p-6 hover:bg-white hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200

inputs.default: flex h-11 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full border-b border-slate-100 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-white/60

hero.style: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center pt-12 pb-24
hero.image_container: relative rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-2xl aspect-[4/5] lg:aspect-square

dashboard.sidebar: hidden md:flex w-64 flex-col border-r bg-white

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the colors defined in this JSON. Add 'Plus Jakarta Sans' and 'Inter' to font family.
3. FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css.
4. COMPONENTS: Use Shadcn UI logic but style them with the classes defined in 'components' section. Do not use default Shadcn styles if they conflict with the 'Corporate Minimalist' vibe.
5. HEADER: Implement the sticky header with the logo redirecting to https://webdesert.in.
6. HERO: Build the split hero section using the 'hero_professional' image. Ensure the text is on the left and image on the right for desktop.
7. FORMS: Use 'react-hook-form' and 'zod' for all forms (Login, Register, Checkout).
8. STATE: Use 'zustand' for Cart state management.
10. TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
universal_guidelines: NO GRADIENTS. Use solid colors and subtle shadows.
NO EMOJIS. Use Lucide icons instead.
MOBILE FIRST. Ensure all grids collapse to 1 column on mobile.
ACCESSIBILITY. Ensure text contrast ratios meet WCAG AA standards (4.5:1).
PERFORMANCE. Optimize images and use lazy loading.
